---
title: "Golf Swing Analyzer MVP"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="analyzer-container fade-in">
  <p class="description">Upload a prerecorded video of your golf swing to receive real-time posture analysis. <strong>100% Private</strong>: all processing is done locally in your browser using Google's MediaPipe Vision API. You can check out the repo here: <a href="https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/golf-swing-analyzer">https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/golf-swing-analyzer</a></p>

  <div class="upload-section">
    <label for="video-upload" class="upload-btn">
      <i class="bi bi-upload"></i> Select Video
    </label>
    <input type="file" id="video-upload" accept="video/*" style="display: none;">
    <span id="file-name" class="file-name">No file chosen</span>
  </div>

  <div id="loading-indicator" class="loading-indicator" style="display: none;">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
      <span class="visually-hidden">Loading Model...</span>
    </div>
    <span class="ms-2">Initializing AI Model...</span>
  </div>

  <div class="workspace">
    <div class="video-wrapper">
      <video id="video-element" controls playsinline style="display: none;"></video>
      <canvas id="output-canvas"></canvas>
    </div>
    
    <div class="dashboard">
      <h3>Analysis Dashboard</h3>
      
      <div class="metric-card">
        <h4>Lead Arm Straightness</h4>
        <div class="metric-value" id="arm-angle">--&deg;</div>
        <div class="recommendation" id="arm-rec">Waiting for video...</div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="metric-card">
        <h4>Athletic Posture (Knees)</h4>
        <div class="metric-value" id="knee-angle">--&deg;</div>
        <div class="recommendation" id="knee-rec">Waiting for video...</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<style>
  .analyzer-container {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem 0;
  }
  
  .description {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    color: var(--bs-body-color);
  }
  
  .upload-section {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  
  .upload-btn {
    background: var(--primary);
    color: white;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
  }
  
  .upload-btn:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.1);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  
  .file-name {
    font-family: monospace;
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .workspace {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
    align-items: start;
  }
  
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .workspace {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }

  .video-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    background: #000;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  }

  video {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  canvas {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  .dashboard {
    background: var(--bs-body-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  }

  .dashboard h3 {
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .metric-card {
    background: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  
  .metric-card h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: #6c757d;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .metric-value {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-family: monospace;
  }

  .recommendation {
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  
  .rec-good {
    background: rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.1);
    color: #28a745;
  }
  
  .rec-bad {
    background: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.1);
    color: #dc3545;
  }
</style>

<script type="module">
import {
  PoseLandmarker,
  FilesetResolver,
  DrawingUtils
} from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.0";

const videoUpload = document.getElementById("video-upload");
const fileName = document.getElementById("file-name");
const videoElement = document.getElementById("video-element");
const canvasElement = document.getElementById("output-canvas");
const canvasCtx = canvasElement.getContext("2d");
const loadingIndicator = document.getElementById("loading-indicator");

const armAngleEl = document.getElementById("arm-angle");
const armRecEl = document.getElementById("arm-rec");
const kneeAngleEl = document.getElementById("knee-angle");
const kneeRecEl = document.getElementById("knee-rec");

let poseLandmarker = undefined;
let runningMode = "VIDEO";
let lastVideoTime = -1;
let isModelLoading = false;

// Geometry Math Ported from Python
function calculateAngle(a, b, c) {
  const radians = Math.atan2(c.y - b.y, c.x - b.x) - Math.atan2(a.y - b.y, a.x - b.x);
  let angle = Math.abs(radians * 180.0 / Math.PI);
  if (angle > 180.0) {
    angle = 360 - angle;
  }
  return angle;
}

function updateRecommendationUI(el, isGood, goodText, badText) {
  el.textContent = isGood ? goodText : badText;
  el.className = "recommendation " + (isGood ? "rec-good" : "rec-bad");
}

async function createPoseLandmarker() {
  if (poseLandmarker) return;
  isModelLoading = true;
  loadingIndicator.style.display = "flex";
  
  const vision = await FilesetResolver.forVisionTasks(
    "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.0/wasm"
  );
  
  poseLandmarker = await PoseLandmarker.createFromOptions(vision, {
    baseOptions: {
      modelAssetPath: "https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/pose_landmarker/pose_landmarker_lite/float16/1/pose_landmarker_lite.task",
      delegate: "GPU"
    },
    runningMode: runningMode,
    numPoses: 1
  });
  
  isModelLoading = false;
  loadingIndicator.style.display = "none";
}

videoUpload.addEventListener("change", async (event) => {
  const file = event.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  
  fileName.textContent = file.name;
  const fileURL = URL.createObjectURL(file);
  videoElement.src = fileURL;
  videoElement.style.display = "block";
  
  // Ensure model is loaded before playing
  if (!poseLandmarker && !isModelLoading) {
    await createPoseLandmarker();
  }
});

// Setup Canvas dimensions to match video once loaded
videoElement.addEventListener("loadedmetadata", () => {
    canvasElement.width = videoElement.videoWidth;
    canvasElement.height = videoElement.videoHeight;
});

// The main loop
async function renderLoop() {
  if (!poseLandmarker) {
    window.requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);
    return;
  }

  if (videoElement.readyState >= 2 && videoElement.videoWidth > 0) {
    // Only infer if video time has advanced
    const startTimeMs = performance.now();
    if (lastVideoTime !== videoElement.currentTime) {
      lastVideoTime = videoElement.currentTime;
      
      poseLandmarker.detectForVideo(videoElement, startTimeMs, (result) => {
        canvasCtx.save();
        canvasCtx.clearRect(0, 0, canvasElement.width, canvasElement.height);
        
        if (result.landmarks && result.landmarks.length > 0) {
          const landmarks = result.landmarks[0];
          
          // Draw standard skeleton lines
          const drawingUtils = new DrawingUtils(canvasCtx);
          drawingUtils.drawConnectors(landmarks, PoseLandmarker.POSE_CONNECTIONS, {
            color: "#00FF00",
            lineWidth: 2
          });
          drawingUtils.drawLandmarks(landmarks, {
            color: "#FF0000",
            lineWidth: 2,
            radius: 3
          });
          
          // Index mapping: 11 (L Shoulder), 13 (L Elbow), 15 (L Wrist)
          // 23 (L Hip), 25 (L Knee), 27 (L Ankle)
          const lShoulder = landmarks[11];
          const lElbow = landmarks[13];
          const lWrist = landmarks[15];
          const lHip = landmarks[23];
          const lKnee = landmarks[25];
          const lAnkle = landmarks[27];
          
          if (lShoulder && lElbow && lWrist && lHip && lKnee && lAnkle) {
            const armAngle = calculateAngle(lShoulder, lElbow, lWrist);
            const kneeAngle = calculateAngle(lHip, lKnee, lAnkle);
            
            // Dashboard updates
            armAngleEl.innerHTML = `${Math.round(armAngle)}&deg;`;
            kneeAngleEl.innerHTML = `${Math.round(kneeAngle)}&deg;`;
            
            const isArmGood = armAngle >= 160;
            updateRecommendationUI(armRecEl, isArmGood, "Lead arm straight: GOOD", "Keep lead arm straight!");
            
            let kneeRec = "Knee posture: GOOD";
            let isKneeGood = true;
            if (kneeAngle > 170) {
                kneeRec = "Add knee bend!";
                isKneeGood = false;
            } else if (kneeAngle < 130) {
                kneeRec = "Less knee bend!";
                isKneeGood = false;
            }
            updateRecommendationUI(kneeRecEl, isKneeGood, "Knee posture: GOOD", kneeRec);
            
            // Draw angle overlays on canvas
            canvasCtx.font = "24px 'Courier New', Courier, monospace";
            canvasCtx.fillStyle = "white";
            canvasCtx.strokeStyle = "black";
            canvasCtx.lineWidth = 3;
            
            const elbowX = lElbow.x * canvasElement.width;
            const elbowY = lElbow.y * canvasElement.height;
            canvasCtx.strokeText(`${Math.round(armAngle)}°`, elbowX + 15, elbowY);
            canvasCtx.fillText(`${Math.round(armAngle)}°`, elbowX + 15, elbowY);
            
            const kneeX = lKnee.x * canvasElement.width;
            const kneeY = lKnee.y * canvasElement.height;
            canvasCtx.strokeText(`${Math.round(kneeAngle)}°`, kneeX + 15, kneeY);
            canvasCtx.fillText(`${Math.round(kneeAngle)}°`, kneeX + 15, kneeY);
          }
        } else {
            // Null state if person goes off camera
            armAngleEl.innerHTML = `--&deg;`;
            kneeAngleEl.innerHTML = `--&deg;`;
            armRecEl.className = "recommendation";
            armRecEl.textContent = "No person detected";
            kneeRecEl.className = "recommendation";
            kneeRecEl.textContent = "No person detected";
        }
        canvasCtx.restore();
      });
    }
  }
  
  // Keep looping independent of video play state so pausing works naturally
  window.requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);
}

// Start watching for frames immediately
window.requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);
</script>
